Patch Set 13: Code-Review+1

I edited the commit message to include the "Test-Parameters: trivial" keyword, which limits testing to "sanity" unless otherwise specified with additional tests via the "testlist=" parameter.  This can be used for patches that are only modifying test scripts, documentation, comments, etc. to reduce testing load and also reduce the chance of spurious unrelated failures.

commit.subject: LU-8157 tests: functional testing for swap layout
commit.message:
LU-8157 tests: functional testing for swap layout

Add a few tests for the swap layout operations.

Test-Parameters: trivial

Signed-off-by: frank zago <fzago@cray.com>
Signed-off-by: Henri Doreau <henri.doreau@cea.fr>
Change-Id: I30210c634a83c01c8c15de06b23581beee6a8eb9
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/13441
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
